'''âs-zh-m-p''' ('''kasazhmepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:brand|brand]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-zh-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:brand|brand]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-zh-m-p
|-
! Lemma
| kasazhmepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
